body:
## Summary — ملخّص

A safe, non-overlapping launch-readiness pass on a dedicated branch. **No merge to `main`, no production actions, no founder-only steps, the 4 open launch PRs untouched.** Releases still go through **Launch Branch → PR → Actions → Review → Founder Approval → Merge**.

> **Verdict / الحُكم: ✅ Private Launch GO · ⛔ Public Launch NO-GO** — sourced from `docs/phase-e/00_GO_NO_GO.md` truth labels (`LIVE_CHARGE_READY=no`, `COLD_WHATSAPP_READY=never`).

## What's in this PR — ماذا يحتوي

1. **`docs/ops/OFFICIAL_LAUNCH_DECISION.md`** (bilingual AR+EN) — verdict, the 11 non-negotiables, code blockers, an evidence-based merge path for the 4 open launch PRs, founder-only blockers with **canonical** secret names, gate checklist + honest local results, rollback plan, and the first-revenue operating plan.
2. **`fix(env)`** — adds the required `JWT_SECRET_KEY` to `.env.example` and enforces `JWT_SECRET_KEY` + `API_KEYS` in `check_env_contract.py`, matching `api/main.py:_validate_production_secrets` (production fail-fast). `make env-check` ✅.
3. **`chore(repo)`** — retargets stale `VoXc2/dealix` → `Dealix-sa/dealix` across **37** operational/user-facing files (README, pyproject, SECURITY, landing pages, runbooks, sales-kit, deploy-workflow comments, scripts). **Preserves** `@VoXc2` code-owner handles (still the sole admin collaborator), the GitHub Pages DNS reference, and historical PR/release/changelog links (GitHub auto-redirects transferred URLs).

## Recommended merge path for the open launch PRs (founder executes via the gate)

All four are **draft**, branch from the same `main@7bd43c3`, and are **independent (not stacked)**. The only conflict surface is **#648 ↔ #650** on two files: `tests/test_landing_forbidden_claims.py`, `tests/test_no_linkedin_scraper_string_anywhere.py`.

1. **#650** first — most complete doctrine/governance gate-greening + the real `/healthz→/health` fix; sets the allowlist superset for the two shared files.
2. **#648** rebased on #650 — resolve the two shared files by taking #650's allowlist + #648's unique additions; keep #648's unique artifacts.
3. **#649** — disjoint; can merge in parallel. Adds the OpenAPI baseline (makes `api-contract-check` meaningful) + PDPL erasure tests + service pages.
4. **#638** — anytime after review + adding the `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY` secret + confirming least-privilege `permissions:` and intentional lockfile changes.

## Verification — التحقق

Sandbox is Python 3.11 with **no app deps installed**; **CI on this PR is the authoritative gate**.

| Gate | Result |
|---|---|
| `make env-check` | ✅ PASS (incl. new `JWT_SECRET_KEY` / `API_KEYS` contract) |
| `make security-smoke` | ❌ **pre-existing** fixture-secret false-positives (`sk_live_/ghp_/AKIA/github_pat_` in `tests/*` + docs) + committed `.env.*.example` — **not introduced here**; same residual #649/#650 document |
| `make api-contract-check` | ⚠️ needs `fastapi` (CI only; no baseline on this branch ⇒ trivial pass) |
| `make test` / `lint` / `type-check` | ⏭️ deferred to CI |

## Non-negotiables honored — احترام الثوابت

No secrets committed · no doctrine/security/compliance guard weakened · no truth label flipped · no external action · no production deploy · no merge to `main` · the 4 open PRs untouched.

---
_Generated by [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code/session_01McMRspog42AEtTzTfbr6oa)_

commits.messageBody:
…contract

api/main.py:_validate_production_secrets fails fast in production when
JWT_SECRET_KEY or API_KEYS is missing/insecure, but the template omitted
JWT_SECRET_KEY and check_env_contract.py did not require either. Add the key to
.env.example and to REQUIRED_KEYS so the gate matches the app. env-check passes.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01McMRspog42AEtTzTfbr6oa

and user-facing files (README, pyproject, SECURITY, landing pages, runbooks,
sales-kit, deploy workflow comments, scripts) plus the OWNER constant in
scripts/push_via_gh_api.py. Preserve @VoXc2 code-owner handles (still the sole
admin collaborator), the GitHub Pages DNS reference, and historical
PR/release/changelog links (GitHub auto-redirects transferred URLs).

commits.messageBody:
… #638)

The repository-hardening.yml Trivy filesystem scan and Gitleaks secret scan
fail on every PR (including this one) for reasons pre-existing on main and
unrelated to this diff: a stale aquasecurity/trivy-action@0.24.0 pin that no
longer resolves upstream, and gitleaks-action@v2 requiring an org license.
Both are repaired by PR #638. Documented in the launch-decision code blockers.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01McMRspog42AEtTzTfbr6oa

title: Launch readiness: OFFICIAL_LAUNCH_DECISION + JWT_SECRET_KEY env fix + VoXc2→Dealix-sa retarget
